title: Indian-Style Curry Rice Bowl
description: A flavorful and aromatic curry rice bowl made with a blend of Indian spices. This dish is perfect for a quick and easy meal.

ingredients.name: spices
ingredients.notes: curry powder, turmeric, and cumin powder mix

instructions: Heat oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add chopped onions and sauté until they start to brown.
Add curry powder, turmeric, and cumin powder mix. Cook for 1 minute.
Add curry and cook for 5 minutes.
Add rice to the pan and stir to combine.
Garnish with chopped fresh cilantro if desired.
